name: &GReligion Temple&n
description:
Type religion <number> to change your religion.

The number means:
0:Justice Guardian of Muir.
1:Pain Bearer of Ilmanateur.
2:Moon Blade of Selune.
3:Law Keeker of Helm.
4:Wisdom Seeker of Ohgma.
5:Battle Guard of Tempus.
6:Dread Master of Bane.
7:Killer Rose of Pandora.
8:Storm Lord of Talos.

AVISO: Mudar religiao acarreta na perda de
4 pontos de con e dex, para players remorteres apenas.
